---
title: Manager
subtitle: A person who manages other people
description: A person who helps a group of people work well together. They plan what work needs to be done, give jobs to people, and make sure everything stays on track.
image: ../../coming_soon.png
---

## {{< meta subtitle >}}

::: {.column-margin}

![](../../coming_soon.png){fig-align="center" fig-alt="placeholder coming soon image"}

:::

{{< meta description >}}
